title: Bachelor of Science in Artificial Intelligence in Digital Twin and Extended Reality (XR)
content: Minimum 50% marks in Class 12th in any stream Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc AI In Digital Twin and Extended Reality (XR)- Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with minimum 50% Marks Note - Option to pursue with Research (Research Project in Final Year) or without Research. 01 02 03 04 01 02 Minimum 50% marks in Class 12th in any stream Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc AI In Digital Twin and Extended Reality (XR)- Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with minimum 50% Marks Note - Option to pursue with Research (Research Project in Final Year) or without Research.
